case_title: LEUNG ALAN VS ORTIZ SERGIO J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEUNG ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ SERGIO J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG ALAN PETITION MAILED ON OCT 06, 1997
CORRESPONDENCE FROM ORLA COSTE RE: HER BROTHER SERGIO ORTIZ'S HEALTH STATUS. ALSO SENT COPY OF PHYSICIANS NOTE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ SERGIO J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00, DEF. TO KEEP PLNTF. INFORMED OF ANY AND ALL ADDRESS OR TELEPHONE # CHANGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
